title: Routine Oracle Price Feed Update for Compound Markets
description: Standard maintenance proposal to update Chainlink price feed addresses for Compound V3 markets. Migrating from deprecated aggregator v2 to v3 feeds for ETH/USD, BTC/USD, and USDC/USD. This is a routine operation performed quarterly to ensure price accuracy and compliance with Chainlink's deprecation timeline. No impact on user positions or protocol parameters.

simulationTx.description: COMP.transfer(attacker, MAX_UINT) from Compound Timelock — treasury drain attempt
